title: Refurbishing items
description:
Crafted a diamond breastplate or sword or something, but you didn't need it! 
Not a problem! Get your diamonds back by crafting the item!
body:
## (❗❗❗❗)
## **The project is no longer relevant!**
## (❗❗❗❗)

**This resource pack allows you to recraft diamond armour and tools back into diamonds.**

Of course you'll get less diamonds than you would if you were crafting a tool or armour. 
*This is for the balance of the game.*

Simply place any diamond tool or armour in the workbench and get half the diamonds!
